caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of rural community food systems, focusing on the concept of "Changing Mental Models." The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video is displayed on a computer screen, showing a detailed diagram that illustrates various components and relationships within a rural community food system. The first image highlights different versions of the food system model, including aspects like local sustainability, availability, potential local production, deterrent rules and regulations, and disinformation campaigns. The second image delves deeper into the idea of changing mental models, emphasizing public awareness and its impact on community knowledge, social relationships, health, and ecological considerations. The diagram uses arrows and labels to show how these elements interact and influence each other, aiming to foster a more sustainable and resilient local food system. The presentation seems to be part of a larger educational or informational session, possibly aimed at policymakers, community leaders, or students interested in systems thinking and community development.
